title: atrichodendron tonkinense
intro: Atrichodendron tonkinense, also known as Tonkin Yellow Birch, is a plant species in the family Sapindaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Atrichodendron tonkinense has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting skin health, due to its rich content of flavonoids and alkaloids. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
